case_title: CAI FENG LIANG VS. GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION,AKA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, CAI FENG AS TO DEFENDANT GARMENT NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION,AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

INC. AND TEAMSHOP $23,531.22 PRINCIPAL, $522.34 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,354.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
